summary: memory_context can add optional LLM-curated XCE-style packaging, but only post-retrieval, default-off, shadow-first, with deterministic fallback and Phase 005 eval proof before active rollout.

label: LLM curation belongs after deterministic retrieval and must not mutate pipeline scores or canonical ranking evidence
The current caller limit blocks top-2K curation unless retrieval candidate budget and presentation limit are split
Existing deterministic response profiles are the baseline; active LLM packaging should wait for held-out eval lift
Causal context is already intent-aware but row-level; packaging can add chain-level structure without replacing ranking
Existing LLM and tool cache patterns can be reused, but curation keys must include candidate-set identity
Active rollout must be default-off and shadow-first because nondeterminism affects retrieval trust
